title: Mentor Guide — Day 2: Opportunity
coachingObjective: Connect industry opportunity to personal goals from Day 1.

timing.preSession: 10 min — review deck speaker notes and observation form
timing.duringSession: Circulate during squad activities; coach individuals at transitions
timing.postSession: 15 min — complete observation forms and coaching notes

discussionQuestions: What surprised you about the industry?
Would you personally buy insurance today? Why?
coachingTips: Link industry facts to Day 1 ambition
Ask for one quote from interview that stuck
reflectionPrompts: How does today change your 3-year picture?

activityCoachingNotes.note: Ensure they ask at least one question about daily habits of top performers.

debriefWithFaculty: Who needs follow-up before market observation?
